recommendations.title: The Man Who Copied
recommendations.overview: A young photocopier operator becomes infatuated with his neighbor and, unable to afford anything from her shop, turns to shady schemes to make money.

recommendations.title: My Uncle Killed a Guy
recommendations.overview: Éder is arrested after confessing the murder of a man. Duca, his nephew, is sure that his uncle confessed the crime to protect his girlfriend, Soraya, ex-wife of the deceased, so he enlists two of his friends to help prove his theory.

recommendations.title: Basic Sanitation, the Movie
recommendations.overview: When they discover their town lacks funding for a sewage system, but does have a federal grant to make a movie, a group of villagers decide to make a sci-fi joint about a monster who lives in the building site of a septic tank.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Tokyo Godfathers
recommendations.overview: On Christmas Eve, three homeless people living on the streets of Tokyo discover a newborn baby among the trash and set out to find its parents.

recommendations.title: Inside Asda: Bigger, Better, Cheaper?
recommendations.overview: The supermarket giant that rose high by taking prices low.

recommendations.title: They Shall Not Grow Old
recommendations.overview: A documentary about World War I with never-before-seen footage to commemorate the centennial of Armistice Day, and the end of the war.

recommendations.title: Fantastic Planet
recommendations.overview: On the planet Ygam, the Draags, extremely technologically and spiritually advanced blue humanoids, consider the tiny Oms, human beings descendants of Terra's inhabitants, as ignorant animals. Those who live in slavery are treated as simple pets and u

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: American Murder: The Family Next Door
recommendations.overview: Using raw, firsthand footage, this documentary examines the disappearance of Shanann Watts and her children, and the terrible events that followed.
